name: Barbara's Brownies from Elegant but Easy Cook
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Egg Beaters® 99% egg substitute or 4 eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray and flour a 9x13-inch pan.
3. Melt margarine and baking chocolate together in microwave.
4. Cream sugar with egg beaters or eggs, vanilla, and melted chocolate mixture.
5. Add flour; mix in optional chopped nuts and chocolate chips (up to 1 cup each).
6. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes. Brownies should be quite moist after baking.
7. Cool completely before cutting.
8. Cut into desired size ahead of time. Freeze if desired.
9. When packing, place on waxed paper "floors."
10. Serve frozen or slightly thawed. Makes about 24 bite-sized brownies.
